debug_info.goal:
q n : ℕ
lamb : ℂ
a : ℝ := lamb.re
b : ℝ := lamb.im
h : lamb ∈ primitiveRoots n ℂ
h_lamb : lamb ≠ 1
h_a_lt_one : ‖a‖ < 1
⊢ ‖eval (↑q) (X - C lamb)‖ ^ 2 = ‖↑q - lamb‖ ^ 2

proof:
simp [eval_sub, eval_X, eval_C]
        <;>
        simp_all [Complex.norm_eq_abs, Complex.abs, Complex.normSq]
        <;>
        ring_nf
        <;>
        norm_num
        <;>
        simp_all [Complex.ext_iff, pow_two]
        <;>
        ring_nf
        <;>
        norm_num
        <;>
        simp_all [Complex.ext_iff, pow_two]
        <;>
        linarith
failed_attempts: rfl

rw [h_eval]
    <;> norm_cast
    <;> simp_all [Complex.abs, Complex.normSq, pow_two]
    <;> ring_nf at *
    <;> norm_num at *
    <;> simp_all [Complex.ext_iff, pow_two]
    <;> ring_nf at *
    <;> norm_num at *
    <;> linarith
  
  sorry

simp [Complex.abs, Complex.normSq, Polynomial.eval_sub, Polynomial.eval_X, Polynomial.eval_C,
          Complex.ext_iff, pow_two]
        <;> ring_nf <;> simp_all [Complex.ext_iff, pow_two] <;>
          norm_cast <;> simp_all [Complex.normSq_apply] <;>
          ring_nf <;> simp_all [Complex.normSq_apply]
        <;> field_simp [Real.sqrt_eq_iff_sq_eq] <;> ring_nf <;>
          norm_num <;> simp_all [Complex.normSq_apply] <;>
          linarith
      _ > ((q : ℝ) - 1)^2 := by sorry

simp [Complex.norm_eq_abs, Complex.abs, Complex.normSq, Complex.ext_iff, pow_two,
          Real.sqrt_lt, Real.sqrt_le_left, Real.sqrt_le_sqrt, sub_nonneg, sub_nonpos]
        <;> ring_nf at * <;> simp_all [Polynomial.eval_sub, Polynomial.eval_pow, Polynomial.eval_X,
          Polynomial.eval_C]
        <;> norm_cast
        <;> simp_all [Complex.ext_iff, pow_two, Real.sqrt_lt, Real.sqrt_le_left, Real.sqrt_le_sqrt,
          sub_nonneg, sub_nonpos]
        <;> try ring_nf at *
        <;> try norm_num at *
        <;> try linarith
        <;> try nlinarith [sq_nonneg (q : ℝ), sq_nonneg (a : ℝ), sq_nonneg (b : ℝ)]
      _ = ‖↑q - lamb‖ ^ 2 := by simp [Complex.norm_eq_abs, Complex.abs, Complex.normSq, Complex.ext_iff, pow_two]
rith

simp [Complex.norm_eq_abs, Polynomial.eval_sub, Polynomial.eval_X, Polynomial.eval_C,
          Complex.abs, Complex.normSq, Complex.ext_iff, Real.sqrt_lt, Real.sqrt_le_sqrt,
          Real.sqrt_nonneg, add_nonneg, mul_self_nonneg, sub_nonneg]
        <;> ring_nf <;> simp_all [Complex.ext_iff, pow_two]
        <;> norm_cast <;> ring_nf
        <;> field_simp [Real.sqrt_eq_iff_sq_eq]
        <;> ring_nf
        <;> norm_num
        <;> simp_all [Complex.ext_iff, pow_two]
        <;> nlinarith
  <;> simp_all [Complex.norm_eq_abs]
  <;> norm_num
  <;> ring_nf at *
  <;> simp_all [Complex.norm_eq_abs]
  <;> nlinarith

simp [eval_sub, eval_X, eval_C, Complex.norm_eq_abs]
        <;>
        norm_cast
        <;>
        simp_all [Complex.abs, Complex.normSq, pow_two]
        <;>
        ring_nf
        <;>
        field_simp [Complex.norm_eq_abs]
        <;>
        norm_cast
        <;>
        simp_all [Complex.abs, Complex.normSq, pow_two]
        <;>
        ring_nf
        <;>
        field_simp [Complex.norm_eq_abs]
        <;>
        norm_cast
rfl
:= by sorry

:= by
    simp [Polynomial.eval_sub, Polynomial.eval_X, Polynomial.eval_C, Complex.norm_eq_abs]
    <;>
    simp_all [Complex.abs, Complex.normSq, pow_two]
    <;>
    ring_nf
    <;>
    norm_cast
    <;>
    field_simp [Real.sqrt_eq_iff_sq_eq]
    <;>
    nlinarith
  have h_final : ‖eval (↑q) (X - C lamb)‖ > (q : ℝ) - 1 := by sorry
  sorry

rw [h₄]
        _ > ((q : ℝ) - 1 : ℝ) ^ 2 := by
          simpa [Complex.ext_iff, pow_two] using h₅

have h₁ : ((X - C lamb).eval (q : ℂ)) = (q : ℂ) - lamb := by
          simp [Polynomial.eval_sub, Polynomial.eval_X, Polynomial.eval_C]
          <;> ring_nf
          <;> simp_all [Complex.ext_iff, pow_one]
          <;> norm_cast
          <;> simp_all [Complex.ext_iff, pow_one]
          <;> ring_nf
          <;> simp_all [Complex.ext_iff, pow_one]
          <;> norm_cast
          <;> linarith
        calc
          ‖((X - C lamb).eval (q : ℂ))‖ ^ 2 = ‖(q : ℂ) - lamb‖ ^ 2 := by
            rw [h₁]
          _ = ‖q - lamb‖ ^ 2 := by
            norm_cast
            <;> simp [Complex.norm_eq_abs]
            <;> ring_nf
            <;> simp_all [Complex.abs, Complex.normSq, Real.sqrt_eq_iff_sq_eq]
            <;> norm_cast
            <;> simp_all [Complex.ext_iff, pow_one]
            <;> ring_nf
            <;> simp_all [Complex.ext_iff, pow_one]
            <;> norm_cast
            <;> linarith
      _ > ((q : ℝ) - 1)^2 := by sorry
  sorry

^ 2 := by rfl
      _ > ((q : ℝ) - 1)^2 := by sorry

rw [h₁]
  -- Since ‖((X - C lamb).eval (q : ℂ))‖ ^ 2 > ((q : ℝ) - 1) ^ 2, we have the required result.
  linarith
2 := by sorry

simp [Polynomial.eval_sub, Polynomial.eval_X, Polynomial.eval_C]

        <;> ring_nf

        <;> norm_num

have h₁ : ((X - C lamb).eval (q : ℂ)) = (q : ℂ) - lamb := by
          simp [Polynomial.eval_sub, Polynomial.eval_X, Polynomial.eval_C]
          <;> ring_nf
          <;> simp [Complex.ext_iff]
          <;> norm_cast
          <;> simp_all
          <;> aesop
        rw [h₁]
        <;> simp [Complex.norm_eq_abs]
      _ > ((q : ℝ) - 1)^2 := by sorry

> (q - 1).
  -- We will use the given inequality of squares to deduce this.
  have h₃ : ‖((X - C lamb).eval (q : ℂ))‖ > (q - 1 : ℝ) := by sorry
  sorry

simp [Complex.norm_eq_abs, Polynomial.eval_sub, Polynomial.eval_X, Polynomial.eval_C]
        <;> simp_all [Complex.abs, Complex.normSq, pow_two]
        <;> ring_nf
        <;> simp [Complex.norm_eq_abs, Complex.abs, Complex.normSq, pow_two]
        <;> field_simp [Real.sqrt_eq_iff_sq_eq]
        <;> ring_nf
        <;> simp_all [Complex.norm_eq_abs, Complex.abs, Complex.normSq, pow_two]
        <;> nlinarith
  sorry

simp [Polynomial.eval_sub, Polynomial.eval_X, Polynomial.eval_C, Complex.abs, Complex.normSq]
        <;>
        ring_nf
        <;>
        simp_all [Complex.ext_iff, pow_two]
        <;>
        norm_cast
        <;>
        simp_all [Real.norm_eq_abs]
        <;>
        ring_nf at *
        <;>
        simp_all [abs_mul, abs_of_nonneg, abs_of_pos, Real.norm_eq_abs]
        <;>
        norm_num at *
        <;>
        nlinarith
  
  simp_all [Complex.norm_eq_abs, Complex.abs, Complex.normSq, pow_two]
  <;>
  ring_nf at *
  <;>
  norm_num at *
  <;>
  simp_all [Real.norm_eq_abs]
  <;>
  nlinarith [sq_nonneg (q - 1)]
  <;>
  try contradiction
  <;>
  try linarith
  <;>
  try nlinarith
  <;>
  try norm_num
  <;>
  try ring_nf at *
  <;>

  <;>

simp [eval_sub, eval_X, eval_C]

:= by sorry
  
  simp_all [h₁, h₂]
  <;>
  (try norm_cast at *) <;>
  (try simp_all [Complex.norm_eq_abs, Complex.abs, Complex.normSq, Real.sqrt_lt, Real.lt_sqrt,
    pow_two]) <;>
  (try norm_num at *) <;>
  (try ring_nf at *) <;>
  (try nlinarith [Real.sqrt_nonneg (a * a + b * b)]) <;>
  (try linarith)

simp [Polynomial.eval_sub, Polynomial.eval_X, Polynomial.eval_C]
        <;>
        simp_all [Complex.norm_eq_abs]
        <;>
        ring_nf
        <;>
        simp_all [Complex.norm_eq_abs]
      _ > ((q : ℝ) - 1)^2 := by sorry
  have h_main : ‖(X - (C lamb)).eval (q : ℂ)‖ > (q - 1) := by
    have h₁ : (q : ℝ) - 1 ≥ 0 := by
      have h₂ : (q : ℝ) ≥ 1 := by
        norm_cast
        have h₃ : q ≥ 1 := by
          by_contra h₄
          have h₅ : q = 0 := by omega
          simp_all [primitiveRoots, Finset.mem_filter, Finset.mem_range]
          <;>
          (try contradiction) <;>
          (try omega)
        omega
      linarith
    have h₂ : ‖((X - C lamb).eval (q : ℂ))‖ ≥ 0 := by positivity
    have h₃ : ‖((X - C lamb).eval (q : ℂ))‖ ^ 2 > ((q : ℝ) - 1) ^ 2 := h_ineq
    have h₄ : ‖((X - C lamb).eval (q : ℂ))‖ > (q - 1 : ℝ) := by
      by_contra h₅
      have h₆ : ‖((X - C lamb).eval (q : ℂ))‖ ≤ (q - 1 : ℝ) := by linarith
      have h₇ : ‖((X - C lamb).eval (q : ℂ))‖ ^ 2 ≤ ((q : ℝ) - 1) ^ 2 := by
        have h₈ : (q : ℝ) - 1 ≥ 0 := by
          have h₉ : (q : ℝ) ≥ 1 := by
            norm_cast
            have h₁₀ : q ≥ 1 := by
              by_contra h₁₁
              have h₁₂ : q = 0 := by omega
              simp_all [primitiveRoots, Finset.mem_filter, Finset.mem_range]
              <;>
              (try contradiction) <;>
              (try omega)
            omega
          linarith
        have h₉ : ‖((X - C lamb).eval (q : ℂ))‖ ≥ 0 := by positivity
        have h₁₀ : ‖((X - C lamb).eval (q : ℂ))‖ ≤ (q - 1 : ℝ) := h₆
        nlinarith
      linarith
    have h₅ : (q : ℝ) - 1 = (q - 1 : ℝ) := by
      cases q with
      | zero =>
        simp_all [primitiveRoots, Finset.mem_filter, Finset.mem_range]
        <;>
        (try contradiction) <;>
        (try omega)
      | succ q =>
        simp [Nat.cast_add, Nat.cast_one]
        <;>
        ring_nf
        <;>
        norm_num
        <;>
        linarith
    have h₆ : ‖(X - (C lamb)).eval (q : ℂ)‖ > (q - 1 : ℝ) := by
      simpa [h₅] using h₄
    have h₇ : (q - 1 : ℝ) = (q - 1 : ℕ) := by
      cases q with
      | zero =>
        simp_all [primitiveRoots, Finset.mem_filter, Finset.mem_range]
        <;>
        (try contradiction) <;>
        (try omega)
      | succ q =>
        simp [Nat.cast_add, Nat.cast_one]
        <;>
        ring_nf
        <;>
        norm_num
        <;>
        linarith
    have h₈ : ‖(X - (C lamb)).eval (q : ℂ)‖ > (q - 1 : ℕ) := by
      simpa [h₇] using h₆
    exact h₈
  exact h_main

simp [eval_sub, eval_X, eval_C]
        <;>
        simp_all [Complex.norm_eq_abs, Complex.abs, Complex.normSq, pow_two]
        <;>
        ring_nf at *
        <;>
        simp_all [Complex.ext_iff, pow_two]
        <;>
        norm_num
        <;>
        linarith
      _ > ((q : ℝ) - 1) ^ 2 := by
        sorry
  
  have h_main : ‖(X - (C lamb)).eval (q : ℂ)‖ > (q - 1) := by
    have h₁ : (q : ℝ) - 1 ≥ 0 := by
      have h₂ : (q : ℝ) ≥ 1 := by
        by_cases hq : q = 0
        · exfalso
          have h₃ : (q : ℕ) = 0 := by simpa using hq
          have h₄ : (lamb : ℂ) = 1 := by
            have h₅ : (lamb : ℂ) ∈ primitiveRoots n ℂ := h
            simp [h₃, primitiveRoots] at h₅
            <;> simp_all [Complex.ext_iff, pow_one]
            <;>
            (try { contradiction }) <;>
            (try { linarith }) <;>
            (try { aesop })
          contradiction
        · have h₃ : (q : ℕ) ≥ 1 := by
            by_contra h₄
            have h₅ : q = 0 := by omega
            contradiction
          exact_mod_cast h₃
      have h₃ : (q : ℝ) - 1 ≥ 0 := by linarith
      exact h₃
    have h₂ : ‖((X - C lamb)).eval (q : ℂ)‖ ^ 2 > ((q : ℝ) - 1) ^ 2 := h_ineq
    have h₃ : ‖((X - C lamb)).eval (q : ℂ)‖ ≥ 0 := norm_nonneg _
    have h₄ : (q : ℝ) - 1 ≥ 0 := h₁
    have h₅ : ‖((X - C lamb)).eval (q : ℂ)‖ > (q : ℝ) - 1 := by
      by_contra h₆
      have h₇ : ‖((X - C lamb)).eval (q : ℂ)‖ ≤ (q : ℝ) - 1 := by linarith
      have h₈ : ‖((X - C lamb)).eval (q : ℂ)‖ ^ 2 ≤ ((q : ℝ) - 1) ^ 2 := by
        have h₉ : ‖((X - C lamb)).eval (q : ℂ)‖ ≥ 0 := norm_nonneg _
        have h₁₀ : (q : ℝ) - 1 ≥ 0 := h₁
        nlinarith
      linarith
    have h₆ : (q : ℝ) - 1 = (q - 1 : ℝ) := by
      norm_num
      <;>
      (try cases q with
      | zero => contradiction
      | succ q' => simp [Nat.cast_add, Nat.cast_one])
      <;>
      ring_nf
      <;>
      simp_all
      <;>
      linarith
    have h₇ : ‖((X - C lamb)).eval (q : ℂ)‖ > (q - 1 : ℝ) := by
      simpa [h₆] using h₅
    have h₈ : (q - 1 : ℝ) = (q - 1 : ℝ) := rfl
    simpa [h₈] using h₇
  exact h_main
rfl
